title: Short title; citation of Code
doc_html:
LOUISIANA CODE OF CRIMINAL PROCEDURE

TITLE I

PRELIMINARY PROVISIONS AND

GENERAL POWERS OF COURTS

CHAPTER 1.  PRELIMINARY PROVISIONS AND

RULES OF CONSTRUCTION

Art. 1.  Short title; citation of Code

This Code shall be known as the Louisiana Code of Criminal Procedure and may be cited officially:  C.Cr.P.

GENERAL POWERS OF COURTS
CHAPTER 1.  PRELIMINARY PROVISIONS AND
RULES OF CONSTRUCTION
Art. 1.  Short title; citation of Code
This Code shall be known as the Louisiana Code of Criminal Procedure and may be cited officially:  C.Cr.P.
